item.name: Meandering Mora
item.description:
Content to simply drift through life with barely a care in the world, this fish is so lazy that it feeds by opening its mouth on the off chance that something edible might find its way inside.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This enormously rotund variety of sunfish does not swim so much as allow itself to be swept along. Meetings between potential mates occur only at the whim of the currents, leading many to wonder how the species has not already drifted into extinction.
